title: Tangy Creamy German Speck Pasta
description: A sour and creamy German dish featuring speck and ferment kimchi, perfect for a romantic evening, and friendly to egg-free diets.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, cook the speck over medium heat until crispy, then set aside.
In the same skillet, add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped ferment kimchi to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes until heated through.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, sour cream, and grated grana padano cheese, and toss until the pasta is well coated.
Add the cooked speck, kimchi mixture, and chopped chives to the bowl, and toss until combined.
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional chives if desired.
